text: Assistant: Now implementing the fix. The root cause: `SessionIdentity::display_slug()` builds `agent/session` using the raw internal `session_id` instead of the friendly `codename` — and the same anti-pattern is repeated in several other display sites, even though a `friendly_short_code`/`codename` mechanism already exists for exactly this purpose. [...] - `identity/keys.rs::display_slug()` — the root source used for kind:0 name, chat "From" labels, statusline, `who`, invite wait, pty_rpc — now uses `self.codename` instead of `self.session_id`.
